title: Thread Library Abstraction Layers
description: A visual representation of the relationship between user applications, thread libraries, and the operating system kernel, showing the level of control each component has over thread management.
relationships: The User Application makes calls to the User-Level Thread Library API
The User-Level Thread Library implements threading functions in user space and may make system calls
The Kernel-Level Thread Library provides the interface for the OS's native thread support
The Operating System Kernel schedules kernel-level threads onto CPU cores
